title: Define MVP scope for property tool
description: Break the initial release into discrete deliverables and acceptance criteria.
context: Need to lock scope so Steve/Sophie can parallelize. Inputs: Daniel's high-level goals, Amy's early research, current data availability.
nextSteps: Draft doc → review with Daniel → publish to team dashboard.

title: Ingest council sales data
description: Normalize the latest property sale exports and publish a clean dataset for engineering.
context: Data drop located in /data/raw/council. Need consistent suburb IDs + price normalization.
nextSteps: Run cleaning notebook → validate sample with Maple → export to /data/clean/council/latest.

title: Prototype suburb scoring algorithm
description: Implement the first pass of the scoring logic using Sophie’s cleaned data.
context: Weights currently guesswork; waiting on Amy's insights. Focus on modular design for future tuning.
nextSteps: Code review with Maple → integrate feedback → prep demo for Daniel.

title: Security baseline audit
description: Run through access, backups, and logging to ensure the new workflows are covered.
context: Focus on repo access, automation secrets, and backup verifications for scripts/daily_backup.sh.
nextSteps: Prepare checklist → execute sweeps → deliver report + recommendations.

title: Interview 5 buyer’s agents
description: Validate core pains and positioning for the property tool story.
context: Need geographic diversity (NSW & VIC) and mix of boutique + franchise agents.
nextSteps: Finalize discussion guide → run interviews → synthesize findings deck.
